ingredients_text: Chicken (64%), BBQ marinade (29%) (Sugar, Worcestershire sauce [Water, Vinegar, Molasses, Sugar, Salt, Spice oils & Extracts {Clove, Ginger, Celery, Black pepper, Capsicum} Starch, Colourant], Tomato paste, Spirit vinegar, Water, BBQ seasoning [Salt, Sugar, Paprika, Garlic, Coriander, Onion, Red bell pepper, Cumin, Thyme, Smoke flavour, Lemon juice powder {Maltodextrin, Lemon juice}, Yeast extract, Anticaking agent, Paprika extract], Garlic, Starch, Salt, Ginger, Stabiliser, Irradiated black pepper), Savoury brine (7%) (Water, Vegetable oil [Canola oil], Salt, Phosphates, Stabilisers, Sugar, Celery extract, Emulsifier).
